base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_death_effect — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Shared enemy-death burst — 4-frame fade. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
